name: @phlix/contracts
description: Framework-agnostic TypeScript REST/wire DTO types + tiny pure helpers for Phlix — the single source of truth for media, playback, auth, hub, library, and event shapes shared across the JS clients (mobile, windows, tizen). Mirrors detain/phlix-shared and the server's JSON response shapes. No Vue/React/axios.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && vite build && tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly -p tsconfig.build.json

author: detain
